content:
The user wants me to convert the provided image into a Markdown table. **1. Analyze the Image:** - The image is a technical specification table. - It has columns for "No", "Item", "Specification", and "Test Method". - The "Test Method" column contains detailed descriptions and even a small embedded table. - The header "Specifications and Test Methods" is present. - The logo "muRata" is in the top right. **2. Structure the Table:** - I need to create a Markdown table that mirrors the structure of the image. - I will go row by row, extracting the text content. - For the embedded table in row 14, I will create a nested Markdown table. **3. Drafting the Content:** * **Header:** * `■ Specifications and Test Methods` * `muRata` * **Table Columns:** * No * Item * Specification * Test Method(Ref. Standard:JIS C 5101 (all parts), IEC60384 (all parts)) * **Row 10:** * No: 10 * Item: Vibration * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance, Q or D.F. | No defects or abnormalities. Within the specified initial value. Within the specified initial value. * Test Method: Mounting method, Kind of Vibration, Vibration Time, Total amplitude, Vibration directions and time | Solder the capacitor on the test substrate, A simple harmonic motion 10Hz to 55Hz to 10Hz, 1min, 1.5mm, This motion should be applied for a period of 2hours in each 3 mutually perpendicular directions(total of 6hours). * **Row 11:** * No: 11 * Item: Substrate Bending test * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance Change | No defects or abnormalities. Within +/-10% * Test Method: Mounting method, Pressurization Method, Flexure, Holding Time | Reflow solder the capacitor on the test substrate, Shown in Fig.2, 1mm, 5+/-1s * **Row 12:** * No: 12 * Item: Solderability * Specification: 95% of the terminations is to be soldered evenly and continuously. * Test Method: Test Method, Flux, Preheat, Kind of Solder, Test Temperature, Test Time | Solder bath method, Solution of rosin ethanol 25(mass)%, 80°C to 120°C, 10s to 30s, Sn-3.0Ag-0.5Cu(Lead Free Solder), 245+/-5°C, 2+/-0.5s * **Row 13:** * No: 13 * Item: Resistance to Soldering Heat * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance Change, Q or D.F., I.R., Voltage proof | No defects or abnormalities. Within +/-7.5% Within the specified initial value. Within the specified initial value. No defects or abnormalities. * Test Method: Pre-treatment, Test Method, Kind of Solder, Test Temperature, Test Time, Preheat Temperature, Preheat time, Post-treatment | Heat treatment:Perform a heat treatment at 150+0/-10°C for 1hour and then let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. Solder bath method Sn-3.0Ag-0.5Cu(Lead Free Solder) 270+/-5°C 10+/-0.5s 120°C to 150°C 1 min Non treatment:Let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. * **Row 14:** * No: 14 * Item: Temperature Sudden Change * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance Change, Q or D.F., I.R., Voltage proof | No defects or abnormalities. Within +/-7.5% Within the specified initial value. Within the specified initial value. No defects or abnormalities. * Test Method: Mounting method, Pre-treatment, Cycles, Temperature Cycling, Post-treatment | Solder the capacitor on the test substrate Heat treatment:Perform a heat treatment at 150+0/-10°C for 1hour and then let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. 5cycles * *Embedded Table:* * Step | Temp. (°C) | Time(min) * 1 | Min.Operating Temp.+0/-3 | 30+/-3 * 2 | Room Temp. | 2 to 3 * 3 | Max.Operating Temp.+3/-0 | 30+/-3 * 4 | Room Temp. | 2 to 3 * Post-treatment note: Non treatment:Let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. * **Row 15:** * No: 15 * Item: High Temperature High Humidity (Steady) * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance Change, Q or D.F., I.R. | No defects or abnormalities. Within +/-12.5% DF≦0.05 More than 25Ω · F * Test Method: Mounting method, Test Temperature, Test Humidity, Test Time, Test Voltage, Charge/discharge current, Post-treatment | Solder the capacitor on the test substrate 40+/-2°C 90%RH to 95%RH 500+/-12h Rated Voltage 50mA max. Non treatment:Let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. **4. Final Review:** - Check for any missed details. - Ensure the embedded table is formatted correctly. - Ensure the text flows logically. Within the specified initial value. Within +/-10% | Mounting method Pressurization Method Flexure Holding Time | Reflow solder the capacitor on the test substrate Shown in Fig.2 1mm 5+/-1s | | 12 | Solderability | 95% of the terminations is to be soldered evenly and continuously. | Test Method Flux Preheat Kind of Solder Test Temperature Test Time | Solder bath method Solution of rosin ethanol 25(mass)% 80°C to 120°C, 10s to 30s Sn-3.0Ag-0.5Cu(Lead Free Solder) 245+/-5°C 2+/-0.5s | | 13 | Resistance to Soldering Heat | Appearance Capacitance Change Q or D.F.
